series_metadata.series_description: This record series contains original documents that show flight locations, date, aircraft flown, departure time, pilot(s) on flight, aircraft flight information, maintenance information, passenger manifest and travel request.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper documents until scanned or otherwise stored electronically then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronically for four(4) years plus current year, then delete; unless, the record series is currently being audited by the Auditor of State, then destroy once the audit report is released., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
